articles.title: Starbucks (SBUX) Set to Report Q2 Earnings with Positive Turnaround Signs
articles.summary: Starbucks (SBUX) is preparing to release its Q2 earnings, with CEO Brian Niccol expressing optimism about a turnaround, projecting 3-4% comparable sales growth and improved operating margins. Despite a high P/E ratio of 81.39 and recent insider selling, the company holds a strong GF Score™ of 86/100, indicating good long-term potential. The franchising of China operations is highlighted as a strategic positive for enhancing revenue and efficiency.
